rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Brave citizens of New Los Angeles: this is
your director general, Maurice Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Today, I come before you
with truly joyous news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0003
rows.name:
News that I have been longing to be able to share with
you since we first set foot on this unknown world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thanks to the tireless efforts of
the brave men and women of BLADE,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0005
rows.name:
we have finally—finally—succeeded in
securing the location of the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Now, make no mistake: recovery of the core will not be easy—[ST:page p1=90 ]especially
as the Growth continue their persecution of our people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0007
rows.name:
But as long as we forge ahead with the same
determination and fortitude that got us this far,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have every confidence we will succeed in our
mission. We will return to our natural bodies,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0009
rows.name:
and take our place as living, breathing
residents of our new home here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Until then, I ask you all to stand together in
strength and courage, as proud citizens of NLA.[ST:wait ]
